title: Zelensky visits Berlin as Germany escalates military support
detail: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky arrived in Berlin for high-level talks with German leadership, with reports indicating Germany is preparing to announce significant escalation in military aid to Ukraine. The visit comes amid intensified Russian attacks and growing pressure on Western allies to increase weapons deliveries.

media.caption: Zelensky's diplomatic visit to Berlin amid escalating German military support

title: Russia launches ballistic missile attack on Kyiv
detail: Russian forces conducted a ballistic missile strike on Kyiv with multiple explosions reported across the Ukrainian capital. Air raid sirens sounded throughout the city as air defense systems engaged incoming missiles. The attack represents a continuation of Russia's systematic targeting of Ukrainian civilian infrastructure and government facilities.

media.caption: Russian ballistic missile strike on Kyiv with explosions reported
